texto: Would you have references?""I'm awfully sorry but I haven't. I just arrived in New York, and don't know a soul. Except you." I smiled but she didn't smile back. She stood hesitating, and I said, "It's true that I'm an escaped convict, an active counterfeiter, and occasional murderer. And I howl during the full of the moon. But I'm neat.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jack Finney que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Would you have references?""I'm awfully sorry but I haven't. I just arrived in New York, and don'…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, character, references, com foco em humor e references.

texto: It may be that the strongest instinct of the human race, stronger than sex or hunger, is curiosity: the absolute need to know. It can and often does motivate a lifetime, it kills more than cats, and the prospect of satisfying it can be the most exciting of emotions.

texto: He's got to have the ability, and it seems to be fairly rare, to see things as they are and at the same time as they might have been. What we mean is the eye of an artist.
